Action: Go to the admin Applications search at /admin/applications
Select an application that is not in the "Accepted" or "Rejected" state, and click "Review application"

Expected Test Results: The managing editor view application form is displayed
"Unlock and Close" is available
The Quick Reject feature is available
The ability to assign to an editor group and associate editor is available
A "SAVE" button is available
Status, Re-assign publisher account, Continuation Information and Subject Classification sections are available
The Journal Labels section is available, offering one option for "Subscribe to Open"
The main application form questions are available
The Notes section is available
The "Group" pull-down asks you to type three characters.
The associate editors and editor are shown in the Individual dropdown

Action: Select an editor from the "Individual" pull-down

Expected Test Results: The editor is selected

Action: Open the Subject Classifier and assign two subject classifications

Expected Test Results: The two subjects you selected show as 'Selected'

Action: Open the subject classifier again and start typing a subject in the subject search box (eg Biology)

Expected Test Results: All terms that include your subject are shown and can be selected

Action: Assign one subject that way and then assign an owner to the application
Make a superficial modification to the application metadata
Click "Add new note" and enter some text into the new note textarea

Expected Test Results: A message tells you that you cannot save the application because it contains some invalid fields
The form scrolls you down to a question which has a missing answer.

Action: Complete the question with the missing answer and 'Save'

Expected Test Results: A message at the top of the form tells you that you can only choose one or two subject classifications
Confirmation dialog is displayed warning you about unsaved changes
The form saves
The changes you applied, both to the form, and in the functionality box, have been saved
The page closes, and you are able to return to the search interface

Action: Prepare two admin accounts (admin1 and admin2), they both can access to the same Application (e.g. /admin/application/1234)

Expected Test Results: New note UI is displayed for you to fill in
The note is saved and displayed in the list of notes
you username and user id will be showed on that note
the date and time you created the note will be shown

Action: Click into the note field and edit the note

Expected Test Results: The note is editable
The note is deleted

Action: Create a new note as per the above steps
Switch to other associate editor account `admin2`

Expected Test Results: You can see the note that you have created before with `admin1`

Action: Attempt to click into the note area and edit it

Expected Test Results: you are unable to edit the note
You are unable to delete the note

Action: Click "copy" button next to one of the fields (eg. Title)

Expected Test Results: Confirmation with fields value is displayed for 3 seconds

Action: Attempt to paste the value (use separate editor)

Expected Test Results: Correct value is pasted

Action: ## Mark as full review feature for admin
Check the current status of the application

Expected Test Results: if the status is not accepted, the `Mark as full review` checkbox is not visible
if the status is accepted, the `Mark as full review` checkbox is visible

Action: Select the status as `Accepted` in Change Status

Expected Test Results: The checkbox `Mark as full review` in the side panel is visible

Action: Click on the `Mark as full review` checkbox

Expected Test Results: The checkbox `Mark as full review` is filled
a new note will be added to the application
It will have the message "Last full review completed on {date} by `{username}`"
your username and user id will be shown on that note
the date and time you save the application will be shown

Action: Search for the journal and click on edit

Expected Test Results: The last full review date is saved in the associated journal
a new note will be added to the journal
It will have the message "Last full review completed on {date} by `{username}`"
your username and user id will be shown on that note
the date and time you save the application will be shown
